steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively emphasizes the similarity between Judeth Insel and David Davidson. Both contributed their musicianship to India Arie's albums, so the correct choice must name both musicians and highlight that shared role.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Judeth Insel played on India Arie's first studio album, *Acoustic Soul*, which was released one year before her album *Voyage to India*.: Doesn't establish the parallel between both contributors. ✗
  • Choice B — *Acoustic Soul* and *Voyage to India*, released in 2001 and 2002, respectively, are albums by singer and songwriter India Arie.: Without naming both, the similarity can't be effectively emphasized. ✗
  • Choice C — Although both musicians have played on India Arie albums, Judeth Insel played viola, whereas David Davidson played violin.: Emphasizes differences in their instruments rather than their shared contribution. ✗
  • Choice D — Judeth Insel and David Davidson both lent their musical talents to albums by India Arie in the early 2000s.: Directly signals the similarity by stating that both lent their talents to India Arie's albums. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
